revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初十]][[zh:十二月初十]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 10|qq=December 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1187|en|1187|qid=Q19731|lt=1187|1=1187}} {{ill|January 21|en|January 21|qid=Q2273|lt=January 21|1=January 21}}) – The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} established the post of {{ill|Chinzei Bugyō|en|Chinzei Bugyō|qid=Q440978|lt=Chinzei Bugyō|1=Chinzei Bugyō}} to oversee the command and military affairs of the vassals in Kyushu. * {{ill|Antei|en|Antei|qid=Q737537|lt=Antei|1=Antei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1228|en|1228|qid=Q5410|lt=1228|1=1228}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}}) – Due to a series of celestial phenomena, the era name was changed from {{ill|Karoku|en|Karoku|qid=Q1194421|lt=Karoku|1=Karoku}} to {{ill|Antei|en|Antei|qid=Q737537|lt=Antei|1=Antei}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1831|en|1831|qid=Q7579|lt=1831|1=1831}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}}) – In response to disasters including a great fire in Edo and an earthquake in Kyoto, the era name was changed from {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} to {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}}. == Births == * {{ill|Kakēi|ja|嘉慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakēi|1=Kakēi (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11419403}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1814|en|1814|qid=Q6943|lt=1814|1=1814}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|qid=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}) – {{ill|Hong Xiuquan|en|Hong Xiuquan|qid=Q334732|lt=Hong Xiuquan|1=Hong Xiuquan}}, a religious leader and revolutionary (died {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}}) – {{ill|Shūsaku Narimasa Chiba|en|Shūsaku Narimasa Chiba|qid=Q5095311|lt=Chiba Shūsaku|1=Shūsaku Narimasa Chiba}}, a swordsman and founder of the {{ill|Hokushin Ittō-ryū|ja|北辰一刀流剣術|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokushin Ittō-ryū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北辰一刀流|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北辰一刀流|1=Hokushin Ittō-ryū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5361345}} (born {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|9|12|11|11|10|1|12|1210|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 12월 10일]] [[ja:12月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月初十]]
